programme.title: The Making of the American Revolution
programme.desc: A behind the scenes look at "The American Revolution" with Ken Burns, Sarah Botstein and David Schmidt to learn about the production, which took nearly a decade to complete.

programme.title: Compass Points From PBS News
programme.desc: Experts analyze prominent international affairs topics and America's role in a shifting world.

programme.title: GZERO World With Ian Bremmer
programme.sub-title: North Korea's Nuclear Bet Pays Off
programme.desc: The Wall Street Journal's Jonathan Cheng talks about North Korea's nuclear bet and what comes next.

programme.title: Tradfest: The Fingal Sessions
programme.desc: Host Fiachna Ó Braonáin with blues legend Eric Bibb, new blues sensation Muireann Bradley and Grammy winning fiddle player Eileen Ivers.

programme.title: Inspector George Gently
programme.desc: A body is found in a local mill.

programme.title: Eight Men Out
programme.desc: The Chicago White Sox, who are set to play the Cincinnati Reds in the World Series of 1919, are at odds with their team's owner, Charles Comiskey, who pays his players unsatisfactory wages despite the team's popularity. A group of professional gamblers offers the Sox's best athletes a fortune to throw the series, and the players agree. However, their reputations and careers are ruined when the dark secret, dubbed the Black Sox Scandal, reaches the public consciousness.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ben Hur
programme.desc: An enslaved Judean prince (Charlton Heston) meets his Roman betrayer (Stephen Boyd), a former friend, in a chariot race.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Eight Men Out
programme.desc: The Chicago White Sox, who are set to play the Cincinnati Reds in the World Series of 1919, are at odds with their team's owner, Charles Comiskey, who pays his players unsatisfactory wages despite the team's popularity. A group of professional gamblers offers the Sox's best athletes a fortune to throw the series, and the players agree. However, their reputations and careers are ruined when the dark secret, dubbed the Black Sox Scandal, reaches the public consciousness.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Tiffany Studios lily sconces circa 1905; a 1904 Philadelphia quilt; a Chinese and Japanese decorative art collection.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: How pulleys work; a rainy story in the Neighborhood of Make-Believe.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.sub-title: The Pea and the Princess; D.W. and Dr. Whosit
programme.desc: Prunella is directing the third-grade's production of "The Princess and the Pea," but nothing seems to go according to her plan; D.W. is determined to watch a new television show after her parents tell her she's too young to watch.

programme.title: Wild Kratts
programme.desc: Chris and Martin search for an obscure rain forest creature.

programme.title: Weather Hunters
programme.desc: The Hunter kids head to the state park to learn why leaves change color.

programme.title: Nature Cat: Nature Cat's Nature Movie Special Extraordinaire
programme.desc: Nature Cat and pals realize they've come to the end of their Nature Curiosity List; Sir Galahad gives himself the title of King, moves into a castle and steals pieces of nature to make it look more beautiful.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: Daniel's Obstacle Course; Daniel Plays in a Gentle Way
programme.desc: Margaret gets upset when Daniel is too fast and too loud on the obstacle course; Daniel and his friends learn that sometimes it is important to play slowly and gently.

programme.title: Cyberchase
programme.desc: The Cybersquad uses time travel to help Hacker understand why his pet smirble BB loves a healthy park.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The renovation of the 1890s Victorian wraps up; touring the house, including its new back extension; the location of the next project is revealed.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Installing top-down bottom-up shades to block the outside view for a tiny guard dog; the anatomy of toilet tanks, common failures and how to fix a running toilet; landscaping a steep front yard.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: On Story
programme.sub-title: On Writing Severance: A Conversation With Dan Erickson
programme.desc: "Severance" creator Dan Erickson discusses his inspiration, writing process and showrunning.

programme.title: State of the Arts
programme.sub-title: Richard Thompson at the Tabernacle, Clifford Ward: I'll Make Me A World
programme.desc: Legendary singer, songwriter, and guitarist Richard Thompson plays a rare solo show at the Tabernacle, a historic space that's become an intimate music venue cherished by performers and audiences alike. Clifford Ward: I'll Make Me a World is a two-part exhibition at ARTWORKS and Grounds for Sculpture presenting the artist's Afrofuturist visions that reclaim and reinterpret the past. And CavanKerry Press, a small publisher of beautiful editions of poetry and creative non-fiction.

programme.title: Great Performances
programme.desc: A widow (Anne Bancroft) struggles to retain her identity in Paddy Chayefsky's teleplay "The Mother.".

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The M Factor 2: Before the Pause-Perimenopause
programme.desc: Exploring solutions for women experiencing perimenopause, the transition years leading to menopause.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Tasty tacos in Tucson, Ariz.; smoky mesquite-grilled tacos rasurados; portable burners.

programme.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
programme.desc: Easy-stretch yogurt pizza dough; arrabbiata slab pizza; tarte flambee; how to turn a kitchen into a pizzeria.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Maple Pork Chops and Squash Soup
programme.desc: Maple pork chops with sweet potato-bacon hash; reviewing enameled cast iron skillets; how to defrost food quickly; leek, fennel and squash soup with sausage.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Sweet potato chickpea gnocchi with gorgonzola; beet and carrot salad; turbot.

programme.title: History With David Rubenstein
programme.desc: Financial columnist Andrew Ross Sorkin discusses what led to "Black Tuesday.".

programme.title: Treasures of New York
programme.desc: A Living Memorial to the Holocaust Situated on the southern tip of Manhattan, the Museum of Jewish Heritage - A Living Memorial to the Holocaust dedicates itself to preserving one of humanity's darkest moments in the hopes of building a better future. In Treasures of New York: Museum of Jewish Heritage, see how this remarkable institution educates through remembrance, combats hate, and ensures that the past is not forgotten.

programme.title: Discovering Judi Dench
programme.desc: The on-screen cinematic career of actress Judi Dench, from "Mrs. Brown" and "Philomena" to "Tea with Mussolini" and "Iris.".

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: When tragedy strikes a local family, Dr. Turner's treatment comes under scrutiny; Trixie worries about the future of midwifery in Britain.

rating.system: Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: The Forsytes on Masterpiece
programme.desc: Disaster strikes at Forsyte & Co. as Soames puts an end to Irene's Parisian dreams; Louisa faces a shock eviction.

programme.title: The Count of Monte Cristo on Masterpiece
programme.desc: Edmond continues to infiltrate the lives of his betrayers, uncovering more dark secrets; Mercedes starts to suspect Edmond's true identity.

programme.title: Murder in the Mountains
programme.desc: The death of a young tech genius leaves Nina and Lukas suspicious of his business partner.

programme.title: Austin City Limits
programme.desc: Country Music Hall of Famer Tanya Tucker sings songs from "Sweet Western Sound"; Brittney Spencer performs songs from her debut "My Stupid Life.".

programme.title: The Caverns Sessions
programme.desc: Formed in 1973, The Headhunters offer funky synth-driven rock compositions as well as reimagined jazz standards.

programme.title: Shakespeare: Rise of a Genius
programme.desc: William Shakespeare leaves the small rural town of Stratford to pursue his dream of becoming a playwright in the dangerous, growing metropolis of London; public theatre is red-hot modernity and Shakespeare begins his journey at the very bottom.
